# Raw Point / Point Network

**Path:** `global_descriptor/learning/point`

Learned global descriptors whose main encoder operates on points or point neighborhoods.

## Scope

**Include:** PointNet family; point convolution; point graph encoder

**Exclude:** primarily voxelized or projected encoders
